pages.title: Powerwall – Home Battery Storage | Tesla
pages.description: Powerwall is a home battery that provides whole-home backup and protection during an outage. See how to store solar energy and sell to the grid to earn credit.
pages.content:
Cybertruck Foundation LogoCybertruck Foundation LogoCybertruck Logo

Receive up to $1,000 Back for Your Powerwall 3

Receive up to $1,000 Back for Your Powerwall 3

[Learn More](https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/powerwall/order/rebate)

![Globe with Powerwall 3](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/1M-Powerwalls-Powerwall-3-Hero-Desktop.png)

# Powerwall

#### Over 1 Million Installed Globally

[Order Powerwall 3](https://www.tesla.com/powerwall/design) [Order With Solar](https://www.tesla.com/energy/design)

# 6.7

## GW

#### Battery Power

# 17.3

## TWh

#### Energy Delivered

# 142.9

## Million

#### Hours Protection

![Powerwall production slide 1](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/Powerwall-Fleet-1-Million-Carousel-Slide-1-Desktop.png)

![Powerwall production slide 2](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/Powerwall-Fleet-1-Million-Carousel-Slide-2-Desktop.png)

![Powerwall production slide 3](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/Powerwall-Fleet-1-Million-Carousel-Slide-3-Desktop.png)

![Powerwall production slide 4](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/Powerwall-Fleet-1-Million-Carousel-Slide-4-Desktop.png)

2015 – The Beginning


The first Powerwall was installed in May 2015.


2017 – Mass Production


Started at Giga Nevada, incorporating a Tesla-designed DC-to-AC inverter.


2023 – Next Generation Powerwall


September 2023 marked the release of Powerwall 3 with an integrated solar inverter.


2025 – 1 Million Powerwall Units


The one millionth Powerwall was installed at a customer's home.


![Go Anywhere](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/power-your-home-desktop.png)

Power Your Home, Save Money

Powerwall is a compact home battery that stores energy generated by solar or from the grid. You can then use your stored energy to power the devices and appliances in your home day and night, during outages or when you want to go off-grid. With customizable power modes, you can optimize your stored energy for outage protection, electricity bill savings and more.


Powerwall is a compact home battery that stores energy generated by solar or from the grid. You can then use your stored energy to power the devices and appliances in your home day and night, during outages or when you want to go off-grid. With customizable power modes, you can optimize your stored energy for outage protection, electricity bill savings and more.


Store Extra Energy


When your solar system generates more energy than you need, you can store the extra energy with Powerwall and save it for later. Powerwall can also recharge from the grid when utility prices are low.


Use Energy


Your stored energy is available whenever you need it—during the day, at night or when an outage occurs. A Powerwall system can power your entire home, including your heater or A/C, as well as other large appliances.


Save and Earn


Using your usage history, weather forecasts and utility price estimates, Powerwall optimizes your stored energy to power your home more efficiently, day and night. With some utilities, you can earn money by selling your energy to the grid.


Storms Happen—Outages Don’t Have To

Keep your home and all appliances powered during an outage. When severe weather is forecast, [Storm Watch](https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/powerwall/mobile-app/storm-watch) will automatically charge Powerwall to its maximum capacity to prepare for an outage. When an outage occurs, Powerwall will help keep your solar system running or, if using grid power, will transition your home to stored energy instantly.


Keep your home and all appliances powered during an outage. When severe weather is forecast, [Storm Watch](https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/powerwall/mobile-app/storm-watch) will automatically charge Powerwall to its maximum capacity to prepare for an outage. When an outage occurs, Powerwall will help keep your solar system running or, if using grid power, will transition your home to stored energy instantly.


- ### Capture More Solar




With a fully integrated solar inverter, Powerwall can efficiently store solar energy and convert it into electricity to power your home. This means you can capture more of the solar energy your system is already generating during the day and use energy to power your home for free at night.

- ### Avoid Peak Pricing




[Time-Based Control mode](https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/powerwall/mobile-app/powerwall-modes#time-based-control) optimizes your stored energy. With variable rate plans, you can program Powerwall to use your stored energy when prices spike, saving money over time.

- ### Earn by Selling




Where grid support programs are available, you can send energy to the grid when demand is high or outages are likely. This supports the sustainable operation of the grid and may earn you credits for the energy you sell. [Learn More](https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/powerwall/virtual-power-plant)


![Aerial view of a home with solar panels and red Model S parked outside a home](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/Powerwall-Capture-More-Solar-Desktop_V2.jpg)

![Close up view of Powerwall 3 installed outside a home](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/avoid-peak-pricing-desktop)

![Tesla app showing earnings](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/carousel-earn-by-selling-desktop)

Maximum Efficiency, Lower Cost

Powerwall can power your entire home with one unit, making whole-home backup protection more affordable. Each unit is self-contained with an integrated solar inverter for added efficiency, resulting in fewer parts and faster installation. This helps make multi-unit systems more affordable and system expansions easier in the future.


Powerwall can power your entire home with one unit, making whole-home backup protection more affordable. Each unit is self-contained with an integrated solar inverter for added efficiency, resulting in fewer parts and faster installation. This helps make multi-unit systems more affordable and system expansions easier in the future.


![Tesla app for energy products](https://digitalassets.tesla.com/tesla-contents/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/max-efficiency-lower-cost-desktop)

Powerwall can power your entire home with one unit, making whole-home backup protection more affordable. Each unit is self-contained with an integrated solar inverter for added efficiency, resulting in fewer parts and faster installation. This helps make multi-unit systems more affordable and system expansions easier in the future.


Powerwall can power your entire home with one unit, making whole-home backup protection more affordable. Each unit is self-contained with an integrated solar inverter for added efficiency, resulting in fewer parts and faster installation. This helps make multi-unit systems more affordable and system expansions easier in the future.


Maximum Efficiency, Lower Cost

Backup protection only works when your backup system is reliable. Powerwall is a home battery system that can be charged from solar panels or the grid and is designed to withstand extreme weather conditions and harsh environments with minimal service or maintenance. It can maintain normal operation in cold temperatures, high humidity and flooding in two feet of water. With Heat Mode, Powerwall heats itself intelligently to maintain optimal charge and discharge performance in temperatures as low as -4°F. [View Heat Mode White Paper](https://energylibrary.tesla.com/docs/Public/EnergyStorage/Powerwall/3/WhitePaper/HeatMode/en-us/Powerwall-3-Heat-Mode-White-Paper.pdf)

Backup protection only works when your backup system is reliable. Powerwall is a home battery system that can be charged from solar panels or the grid and is designed to withstand extreme weather conditions and harsh environments with minimal service or maintenance. It can maintain normal operation in cold temperatures, high humidity and flooding in two feet of water. With Heat Mode, Powerwall heats itself intelligently to maintain optimal charge and discharge performance in temperatures as low as -4°F. [View Heat Mode White Paper](https://energylibrary.tesla.com/docs/Public/EnergyStorage/Powerwall/3/WhitePaper/HeatMode/en-us/Powerwall-3-Heat-Mode-White-Paper.pdf)

Energy That’s There When You Need It

Powerwall backup protection extends beyond the home. You can optimize your stored energy to charge your electric vehicle with clean energy during the day, at night or during an outage. Adjust your system settings to charge exclusively with excess solar energy or share your electric vehicle’s battery power with your home using Powershare to extend your home’s backup support during an outage.


Powerwall backup protection extends beyond the home. You can optimize your stored energy to charge your electric vehicle with clean energy during the day, at night or during an outage. Adjust your system settings to charge exclusively with excess solar energy or share your electric vehicle’s battery power with your home using Powershare to extend your home’s backup support during an outage.


Charge on Solar
